scenario: Verify that process succeeds with valid status
expected_result: Process operation completes successfully with valid status

scenario: Verify process operation with all valid inputs
expected_result: Process completes and returns success response

scenario: Verify error when status is missing
expected_result: System returns validation error indicating status is required

scenario: Verify error when status is empty
expected_result: System rejects empty status with appropriate error message

scenario: Verify error when status has invalid format
expected_result: System rejects invalid status format and shows format hint

scenario: Verify status at minimum allowed length (1 character)
expected_result: System accepts status at minimum boundary

scenario: Verify status at maximum allowed length
expected_result: System accepts status at maximum boundary

scenario: Verify status exceeding maximum allowed length
expected_result: System rejects status exceeding maximum length with error

scenario: Verify status with only whitespace characters
expected_result: System trims whitespace and validates status correctly

scenario: Verify status with Unicode / special characters
expected_result: System handles Unicode in status without crashing
System handles duplicate process gracefully without data corruption
System maintains data integrity during concurrent process operations

scenario: Verify SQL injection attempt in status — input: ' OR '1'='1
expected_result: System sanitises input and rejects SQL injection in status

scenario: Verify XSS attempt in status — input: <script>alert('xss')</script>
expected_result: System sanitises HTML/JS and prevents XSS via status

scenario: Verify process is not accessible without authentication
expected_result: System returns 401/403 for unauthenticated process attempt
